channel.title: Embedded on CodetoCore
channel.description: Recent content in Embedded on CodetoCore

item.title: Why Does My Code Work in Debug But Break in Release?
item.description: Short answer: optimization isn't doing the wrong thing. Your code was always wrong — debug builds just happened to hide it.

item.title: What Actually Happens Before main() Runs?
item.description: A lot. The CPU walks through six setup stages between power-up and your first line of C — and bugs in any of them look very different from each other.
